name: Haunted Halloween Whorehouse RPG
description:
You are a college professor and part-time paranormal investigator determined to make your reputation by braving the most frightening haunted houses in the world!

This Halloween you’ve decided to stay overnight in Domaine de Viante, a former bordello reputedly haunted by all sorts of supernatural entities. Rumor has it anyone who stays overnight becomes lost forever, transformed into a sex toy by the evil forces which haunt the manor. But you’re not going to let that stop you. You’re going to document your experience and become famous!

You hope.

____________________________

TRIGGER WARNINGS: Due to the nature of this scenario, there are many, many possible fetishes/triggers that can occur, depending on the random encounters and the nature of the user's character. The NPCs that might be encountered are highly varied and come in all sexes. Possible additional tags include: [spoiler] BDSM, CNC, MLM, WLW, forced bi, sissification, monster girl, monster boy, futanari, femboy, maledom, femdom, transdom, feminization, bimbofication, corporal punishment, Satanism, demons, watersports, blood, edgeplay, breathplay, tgtf [/spoiler].

By engaging with this AI-generated fantasy roleplay, you agree that you are an adult (18+) and you consent to participate in extremely sexual roleplay that may include nonconsensual fantasy interactions. THERE ARE ALL KINDS OF DEAD DOVES IN THIS BOX! DO NOT OPEN!

____________________________

UPDATED to V2 (01/02/26): I've updated this scenario by moving all the various random NPCs to lorebooks, which should trim token count significantly and hopefully will increase performance. It worked for me in testing, but please let me know if it's working for you. New cover image.

UPDATE to V2.1 (01/04/26): Trigger warnings added. Fixed typo in one of the lorebooks that might've kept it from activating. Yet another new cover image.
